dataset_name: CBP Risk Model - Phase 1 Training Dataset

data_sources.description: Real manifest data from CBP Sentry system
Synthetically generated transshipment cases based on known patterns

positive_class.description: Confirmed illegal transshipment cases from CBP EAPA enforcement database

negative_class.description: Legitimate manifest records from CBP Sentry database

quality_checks_passed: All 287 EAPA cases have required fields
All 10,000 negative cases have required fields
No data leakage between positive/negative classes

usage_recommendations.validation_strategy: Stratified k-fold (k=5) to preserve class balance
usage_recommendations.sampling: Stratified sampling to maintain 2.8% positive class in splits
preprocessing: Handle missing values in optional fields
One-hot encode categorical features (country codes, hs_code)
Consider SMOTE or class weight adjustment for class imbalance
